name: BP1658CJ LED driver
description: The BP1658CJ output component exposes a BP1658CJ channel of a global [Component/Hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/bp1658cj#bp1658cj-component) as a float output.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.

config_entries.label: Bp1658Cj ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [Component/Hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/bp1658cj#bp1658cj-component). Use this if you have multiple BP1658CJ chains you want to use at the same time.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: Chose the channel of the BP1658CJ chain of this output component.
